name: Yuugi Hoshiguma
description:
Another touhou character, now is Yuugi Hoshiguma the strong and alcoholic oni 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥

As always, have fun with this bot and if you want to you can leave a review and a like or a dislike I don't know, to see how I can improve or fix something in the bot
